brainVsSilicon.note: 21MW for a frontier model's training cluster to approach brain-scale reasoning. Human brain operates on ~20W — the equivalent of a dim light bulb.

_note_demandSurge: US five-year peak demand forecasts — surged six-fold between 2022 and 2025, driven overwhelmingly by AI data centres.
_note_jevonsParadox: Approximate multipliers indexed to 2015 baseline. Both hardware efficiency and total training energy have risen together — efficiency gains are consumed by ever-larger model ambitions. Source: POWER-summary.md.
